prompt: Create 2 strong logo concept images for the woodworking media brand 'Bois Pratique'. Direction: inspired by a premium practical workshop aesthetic. The previous logo direction felt too much like classic typography and not enough like a real brand mark. Make it feel like an actual logo system: iconic symbol first, bold recognizable mark, minimal editorial branding, geometric or tool-inspired emblem, wood grain or workshop cues, modern but warm, premium, practical, memorable. Neutral clean background, no mockup hands, no fake website UI, no long text, no watermark. If text appears, keep it extremely secondary; priority is the symbol and visual identity mark.
